title: python-eventlet vulnerability
description:
It was discovered that Eventlet incorrectly handled certain requests.
An attacker could possibly use this issue to bypass front-end security
controls, launch targeted attacks against active site users, and poison web
caches.
full_text:
It was discovered that Eventlet incorrectly handled certain requests.
An attacker could possibly use this issue to bypass front-end security
controls, launch targeted attacks against active site users, and poison web
caches.
